tasks.label: Spin Up Test Container
tasks.command: docker run --name neo4j-vscode-test -p 7788:7687 -e NEO4J_AUTH=none neo4j:5-community; sleep 3

tasks.label: Start Neo4j and Wait
tasks.command: docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q '^my-neo4j$' || docker run -d --rm --name my-neo4j -p 7688:7687 -e NEO4J_AUTH=none --health-cmd="cypher-shell 'RETURN 1'" neo4j:latest; until [ "$(docker inspect --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' my-neo4j 2>/dev/null)" = "healthy" ]; do sleep 0.5; done
